corrections.note: Printed text has nominative συμβίωσις, not accusative συμβίωσιν.
Apparatus prints Latin-script o, not Greek omicron with rough breathing; transcript misdecoded the character.
The siglum is B with superscript a followed by b, then A; transcript has the superscript attached to the wrong letter.
Printed apparatus has abbreviation inscrip. with period.
Apparatus is printed without accents here; transcript introduced accented forms.

notes: Running head and body largely match. Left-margin line numbers 23, 29, 30 and chapter/verse markers are handled correctly; no line-number leakage into body. Apparatus mostly accurate, with a few siglum/character decoding issues.
